title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Who’s-Who, Unknown person #12 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: About that thing I wanted to ask you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huff...huff... back when I was in prison...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was mockingly told to pray to a certain someone for salvation!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Apparently, slaves in ancient times believed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In a legen- Dary warrior that would eventually come and save them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was said he would bring laughter to their lips and free them from their suffering. Who knows if he really existed though...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My cruel sentence was dragging on for what felt like forever,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So I clung on to the legend!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't care about the details, I just wanted to be saved!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What does this have to do with me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard the crew was made up of former slaves!! Besides, isn't the history of fishermen a history of slavery?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 26 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
